chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Line Item
triplets.predicate: unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: Return Policy
triplets.object: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund

triplets.subject: Products
triplets.object: 30 days of purchase for a full refund

entities_post_resolution.name: 30 Days Of
entities_post_resolution.definition: A return/refund policy that allows customers to return products within 30 days of purchase to receive a full refund.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Active/Inactive Status
entities_post_resolution.definition: A boolean column flag indicating whether a given entity instance is active and allowed to engage in its typical business actions (e.g., customers can place orders; products are currently for sale).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses
- Geographic region for tax calculation
- Active/inactive status | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CUST_ID | INT | Unique customer identifier | NO |
| FULL_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Customer's full name | NO |
| EMAIL | VARCHAR(150) | Unique email address for login | NO |
| REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES |
| CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Account creation timestamp | NO |
| IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether customer can place orders | NO |
 | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO |
| SKU | VARCHAR(50) | Stock Keeping Unit code | NO |
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO |
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO |
| UNIT_PRICE | DE

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category
entities_post_resolution.definition: TB_CATEGORY represents the product category in the catalog, uniquely identified by CATEGORY_ID and described by CATEGORY_NAME, forming a hierarchical category tree.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Hierarchical product category tree.

**Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment)
 | **Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Unique category identifier | NO |
 | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Unique category identifier | NO |
| CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO |
 | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Unique category identifier | NO |
| CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO |
| PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES |
 | Category         → TB_CATEGORY | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Descriptio

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master
entities_post_resolution.definition: Master record for all registered platform customers in the e-commerce database, identified by CUST_ID as the primary key.

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition: A person or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase and may receive refunds when orders are cancelled.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses
- Geographic region for tax calculation
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | Customer Relationships:
- A Customer places zero or more Sales Orders | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item is a single product entry in a sales order that specifies the quantity and references exactly one product.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | **Examples**:
- Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Order Line Item Relationships**:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | **Order Line Item Relationships**:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Date
entities_post_resolution.definition: ORDER_ID is the unique identifier (primary key) for a customer sales order header.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CUST_ID | INT | Customer who placed order | NO |
| ORDER_DATE | DATE | Date order was placed | NO |
 | SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order.

**Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)
 | **Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO |
 | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: Represents a single line item (a specific product entry) within a sales order, detailing the product, quantity, and value associated with that order line.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Order ID
- References exactly one Customer
- Order date when transaction was initiated
- Total monetary value
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)
 | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO | | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | Product Relationships:
- A Product appears on zero or more Order Line Items | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items |

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: Sales Order: a customer-initiated document in a sales process representing a request to purchase and receive specified goods or services, containing at least one line item and requiring payment confirmation before shipment.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Order ID
- References exactly one Customer
- Order date when transaction was initiated
- Total monetary value
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item | **Order Line Item Relationships**:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | A Sales Order is placed by exactly

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Payment is a monetary transaction associated with a Sales Order, identified by PAYMENT_ID, carrying a payment amount, and potentially multiple payments per Sales Order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | **Key Attributes**:
- Payment amount | **Business Rules**:
- Payment must be confirmed before order ships | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments | A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: PRODUCT_NAME represents the human-readable display name of a product as shown in catalogs and listings.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| SKU | VARCHAR(50) | Stock Keeping Unit code | NO |
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO |
 | TB_PRODUCT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master catalogue of all products available for sale.

**Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment)
 | **Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO |
 | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Product
entities_post_resolution.definition: A product is an item offered for sale, identified by a unique SKU and described by attributes such as name, unit price, active status, and its belonging category.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique SKU code
- Human-readable product name
- Unit price in base currency (EUR)
- Active/inactive status
- Belongs to exactly one Category | **Business Rules**:
- Must belong to a valid category before being sold
- Prices can change daily based on market conditions
- Inactive products cannot be ordered but remain for historical reference | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | **Order Line Item Relationships**:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | Product Relationships:
- A Product belongs to exactly one Category | Product Relationships:
- A Product appears on zero or more Order Line Items | An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | Product          → TB_PRODUCT | Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Shipment is the fulfillment unit in an e-commerce system, uniquely identified (Shipment ID), linked to a single Sales Order, tracked by status, and potentially consisting of multiple shipments per order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | **Key Attributes**:
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | **Business Rules**:
- Can only be created for confirmed orders with payment | A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments.

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Sales Order is a formal transaction document that records the agreement between a platform and a Customer to supply Products, identified by a unique Order ID, references a Customer, has an order date, total value, status, and contains at least one order line item.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Order ID
- References exactly one Customer
- Order date when transaction was initiated
- Total monetary value
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item | **Order Line Item Relationships**:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | A Sales Order is placed by exactly

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price
entities_post_resolution.definition: The monetary amount charged per single unit of a product, stored as a decimal value in EUR within the product catalog.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO |
| SKU | VARCHAR(50) | Stock Keeping Unit code | NO |
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO |
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO |
| UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO |
 | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique SKU code
- Human-readable product name
- Unit price in base currency (EUR)
- Active/inactive status
- Belongs to exactly one Category

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition: A formal contract documenting the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Definition**: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products. | **Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

entities_post_resolution.name: Valid Email Address
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses
- Geographic region for tax calculation
- Active/inactive status

entities_post_resolution.name: Warehouse
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse

entities_post_resolution.name: Amount
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Key Attributes**:
- Payment amount

**Key Attributes**:
- Payment amount

entities_post_resolution.name: At Least One Order
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase

entities_post_resolution.name: Confirmed Orders With Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Business Rules**:
- Can only be created for confirmed orders with payment
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Rules**:
- Can only be created for confirmed orders with payment

- Active/inactive status

entities_post_resolution.name: Exactly One Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Order ID
- References exactly one Customer
- Order date when transaction was initiated
- Total monetary value
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Order ID
- References exactly one Customer
- Order date when transaction was initiated
- Total monetary value
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item

entities_post_resolution.name: Multiple Addresses
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type

entities_post_resolution.name: Price
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)

entities_post_resolution.name: Purchase
entities_post_resolution.definition: **Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

entities_post_resolution.name: Quantity × Unit Price
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

entities_post_resolution.name: Units
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Examples**:
- Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Examples**:
- Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each

entities_post_resolution.name: Valid Category
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Business Rules**:
- Must belong to a valid category before being sold
- Prices can change daily based on market conditions
- Inactive products cannot be ordered but remain for historical reference
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer information including identifiers, contact details, regional grouping, account creation timestamp, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about products, including identifiers, stock-keeping details, naming, category association, pricing, and whether the product is active.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores hierarchical category data for products, including each category's name and a reference to its parent category.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores the header-level information for customer sales orders, including identifiers, order timing, total amount, status, payment confirmation, and delivery timestamps.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores the individual line items for orders, including the product, quantity, unit price, and line total amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores payments made for customer orders, including method, amount, status, and timestamps for confirmation and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments associated with orders, including where the shipment originated, when it shipped, its tracking information, and current status.
